lang.label: Language
tierList.title: The First Descendant
tierList.subtitle: Each sign-in is one vote (S–D). We combine votes with weights S=5 … D=1. Tier rows follow the rounded community average. Use Display: Tiers for a compact grid, or Votes for distribution bars and score %. Ultimate and base descendants share one entry. Click an entry to vote or browse public builds.
tierList.modalSignInHint: You must sign in to vote. You will be redirected to the sign-in page.
tierList.modalNoBuilds: No public builds listed for this {target} yet. In the tracker Builds tab, set a build to Public on the tier list switch with profile sharing Open.
tierList.modalNoBuildsHint: If yours should show: set the build to Public (Builds tab), set Friends → profile sharing to Open, save, then wait a few seconds for sync. Try the “All” filter if you use Base / Ultimate.
tierList.modalNoBuildsFilter: No public builds match this filter. Try “All” or switch between Base and Ultimate.
tierList.buildVariantAria: Filter public builds by base or Ultimate descendant
tierList.scoreHint: 0% means votes average toward D; 100% toward S.
tierListMod.title: Tier list mod (private)
tierListMod.hint: Synthetic overlay adds or removes weighted vote counts without deleting real users. Use negative numbers to pull down a tier. Set TIER_LIST_MOD_DISCORD_IDS on the server to your Discord user ID (snowflake).
tierListMod.noVoters: No real votes for this entry.
tierListMod.confirmReset: Clear synthetic overlay for this entry? Real votes stay.
tierListMod.confirmDeleteVote: Delete this user’s vote row permanently?
home.heroSub: Keep track of every reactor, weapon, and descendant — saved to your account, accessible anywhere, shareable with your squad.
home.heroNote: No account needed beyond Discord · Your data stays private · Share when you want to
home.ctaTierListSub: Vote on descendants & weapons · browse public builds
home.featuresHeading: Everything you need to track your build
home.footer: TFD Tracker — not affiliated with NEXON Games Co., Ltd.
home.ctaSectionSub: Sign in with Discord and your tracker is ready instantly — no setup required.
home.feature.1.title: Reactor Inventory
home.feature.1.desc: Log every reactor with element, skill type, substats, and tier coloring. Instantly see which are Ultimate-tier.
home.feature.2.title: Weapons Catalog
home.feature.2.desc: All 140+ weapons pre-loaded. Track acquired status, level, catalysts, enhancement, and weapon core per weapon.
home.feature.3.title: Descendant Progress
home.feature.3.desc: Track every descendant you've built — level, arche level, and catalyst investment across your whole roster.
home.feature.4.title: Saved Builds
home.feature.4.desc: Plan module loadouts per weapon or descendant, save named builds, and share them with your squad.
home.feature.5.title: Farming Goals
home.feature.5.desc: Set active farming targets, toggle them done, and filter down to only what you're currently grinding.
home.feature.6.title: Friend Inventories
home.feature.6.desc: Add friends by share link and browse their full read-only inventory. See exactly what gear your squad has.
